what_it_does: HQ-SAM upgrades Segment Anything for higher-quality zero-shot masks, with demos, pip install path, and HQ-SAM 2 notes.
succinct_summary: Strongly relevant for clean foreground masks, background separation, and segmentation-assisted avatar asset prep.
possible_use: Candidate tool for cutting Morgan out of source imagery, refining masks, or preparing layered portrait/background assets.
important_notes: Model checkpoints are external; cloning skipped LFS smudge and does not fetch weights.
